commands: export HOME=/root && PHP_INI=$(php -r "echo php_ini_loaded_file();") && echo "PHP INI: $PHP_INI" && grep -n 'upload_max_filesize\|post_max_size' $PHP_INI 2>&1

export HOME=/root && PHP_INI=$(php -r "echo php_ini_loaded_file();") && sed -i 's/^upload_max_filesize.*/upload_max_filesize = 64M/' $PHP_INI && sed -i 's/^post_max_size.*/post_max_size = 64M/' $PHP_INI && echo 'PHP INI updated'

export HOME=/root && APACHE_PHP_INI=$(ls /etc/php/*/apache2/php.ini 2>/dev/null | head -1) && echo "Apache PHP INI: $APACHE_PHP_INI" && sed -i 's/^upload_max_filesize.*/upload_max_filesize = 64M/' $APACHE_PHP_INI && sed -i 's/^post_max_size.*/post_max_size = 64M/' $APACHE_PHP_INI && echo 'Apache PHP INI updated'
systemctl restart apache2 && echo 'Apache restarted OK'
